community.title: Join Our Community
community.subtitle: Whether you're an educator, a learner, or looking for what's next, we have a place for you.
community.staffDesc: Access your dashboard to manage courses, track attendance, and support student success with powerful digital tools.
community.studentDesc: Start your learning journey, access course materials, and track your academic performance in real-time.
community.parentDesc: Parents access performance, attendance, assignments, feedback, communication and resources to support learning.
community.afterClassDesc: Continue your growth beyond the classroom. Explore advanced courses or browse career-ready opportunities.
